violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the spray bottle was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

Latte barista mix labeled "refrigerate after opening" was observed held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The product was in a refrigerator with hot teas that were cooling at the time. The ambient temperature of the refrigerator was 57 degrees Fahrenheit. The product was moved to another refrigerator to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. (Sanitizer solution was remade at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
At the time of inspection, Utensils used for stirring beverages were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
